title: DSIT Fellowship (open for applications)
body: "The Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) 2025/2026 Fellowship invites applications for DSIT secondments in science, innovation and technology. Successful Fellows will be invited to join a DSIT team for for 2-3 days per week over 12 months.  Currently, there are DSIT Fellowship placements in:   Artificial Intelligence (AI) Technology Future Thinking Public Sector Innovation   You can find the current list of DSIT Fellowship placements here.   You will need to submit your application by 11.59pm on 3 June 2025. To apply, download and complete the application form and send to expertexchange@dsit.gov.uk.   Guidance for applicants  The DSIT Fellowship guidance includes:   eligibility criteria benefits for you and a organisation (your employer) how to apply how the selection process will work   If you have any questions, please contact us at expertexchange@dsit.gov.uk.  "
